## Year 31

- [GRN] **cave_discovery**: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
- [GRN] **breakthrough**: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.

**Activity:** explore(3), hoard(3), pray(2), sabotage(1), mediate(1)

diaries.text:
**Ember Sto** (earth/sentinel) — Year 31

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

We did something impossible today.

*— Ember Sto, sentinel*

**Iron Mar** (fire/scholar) — Year 31

The fire in me stirs with possibility.

We did something impossible today.

*— Iron Mar, scholar*

**Fen Marsh** (water/healer) — Year 31

The water in me stirs with possibility.

We did something impossible today.

*— Fen Marsh, healer*
